summary: PRODUCTION FORENSIC VALIDATION COMPLETE - https://biqc.thestrategysquad.com. ALL CRITICAL ISSUES FROM ITERATION 132 NOW FIXED. War Room Q&A working (readable answers in UI), Ops Advisory working (recommendations loading), Documents working (no API 500), Priority Inbox working (priority sections with real Outlook data). Weekly Check-In banner correctly positioned in SoundBoard panel under Forensic Market Exposure.
